name: linear-progress-sync
description: Safely sync Codex and Git development progress into Linear comments.

interface.shortDescription: Sync real development progress to Linear safely.
interface.longDescription: Linear Progress Sync watches Codex and Git activity, queues progress events locally, and asks Codex to update inferred Linear issues with safe comments only.
defaultPrompt: Summarize queued Linear progress sync events
Drain the Linear progress sync queue safely
